# 🎮 Pull Request

## 📌 Summary
<!-- What does this PR change? 1–3 short lines. -->

## 🧩 Type of Change (check all that apply)
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (gameplay / UI / tools)
- [ ] Content (assets, levels, dialogues, etc.)
- [ ] Refactor / tech debt
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Build / CI
- [ ] Documentation

## 🧠 Design Context (if applicable)
<!-- Game design intent, mechanic changes, balancing decisions, tradeoffs, references. -->
- 

## ✅ Quality Checklist
- [ ] Builds / runs locally
- [ ] Does not break main game flow or core scenes
- [ ] Tested edge cases (weird inputs, partial states, etc.)
- [ ] No debug prints/logs left behind (unless intentional)
- [ ] No orphaned/unused assets
- [ ] Naming and project structure follow conventions

- [ ] Screenshot(s)
- [ ] Video or GIF
- [ ] Before / After comparison

## 📦 Asset Impact (if applicable)

- [ ] Modified existing assets
- [ ] Removed assets (references updated)
